title: salix × lyonensis
intro: Salix × lyonensis, also known as Lyon's willow or Lyon's poplar willow, is a hybrid plant that is a cross between the black willow (Salix nigra) and the white willow (Salix alba). The bark and leaves of this plant contain salicin, a compound that has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include reducing inflammation and relieving pain. The health benefits of Salix × lyonensis include its ability to ease headaches, fever, and arthritis symptoms, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The bark can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and the leaves can be made into a decoction, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for medicinal purposes.
